details.test: Task 1: Largest private studio under $2000 on ground floor added to shortlist
Task 2: Schedule in-person tour with mobility assistance as daughter
Task 3: Select cheapest memory care plan (adapted >=2 meals, < $3000) and request info
Task 4: Create and save monthly cost estimate under $3500 with specific services
Task 5: Add one music and one light exercise activity to visit plan (within date range)
Task 6: Complete new resident online application with specified details
Task 7: Reserve free medical shuttle operating >=3 days/week for specific date/time
Task 8: Plan diabetic-friendly, low-sodium meal with two portions of a qualifying dish
Task 9: Send clinical care question to Director of Nursing via team contact form
